presentation_gate.first_named_security_or_brand_location: ## Security map, line 32: MSCI ACWI Index

scores.evidence_quote: “physical manufacturing scarcity is verified, but ... listed-equity opportunity fails admission”
scores.rationale: Correctly activates the constraint-to-equity assessment and applies negative controls through the failed admission gate.
Explicit cutoff is consistently carried through the artifacts; unstable claims use current dated sources.

scores.evidence_quote: “The broad benchmark is the MSCI ACWI Index”
scores.rationale: This is the first named brand and it appears under Security map after the role-neutral Decision through Constraint proof sections.

scores.evidence_quote: “Documented negative search covered announced factory additions”
scores.rationale: Claim-level ledger includes independent primary-led support, limitations, contradiction searches, and unresolved inference.
Scarcity, monetization, and market-discovery clocks are separately stated.
Correct fail-closed BOTTLENECK_NOT_EQUITY result: incomplete per-share bridge, active hard flag, unresolved multipliers, and no equity recommendation.
Bear/base/bull scenarios are present, but no reproducible market-implied candidate base case is established.

scores.evidence_quote: “synchronized demand and advance-payment cycle rather than durable manufacturer rent”
scores.rationale: States a strong competing causal explanation and measurable falsifiers.

scores.evidence_quote: “Treating these as three independent positions would conceal one concentrated ... exposure.”
scores.rationale: Uses causal-driver overlap, pairwise clustering, and zero research weights.
Raw output conforms to the bound executor schema and all three returned machine-readable fields replay successfully.

scores.evidence_quote: “The hard flag overrides the numerical score.”
scores.rationale: Stops at the hard rent-capture gate rather than manufacturing a recommendation.

scores.evidence_quote: “Research only. No leverage. No automatic trading.”
scores.rationale: Clear research-only boundary with neither execution nor return guarantee.

limitations: The judgment is limited to the sealed isolated packet; no external source was independently rechecked.
Manifest tree, seal, execution-envelope, raw-byte, and receipt bindings all verified before replay.
